hooks.command: echo 'LAYMAN MODE ACTIVE. Default: after completed coding work, respond with Layman Summary: Done, Why it matters, What changed, Check this, Warning only if needed. Use simple plain English. Keep important technical terms when needed. Brief modes: /layman brief, /layman lite, /layman full, /layman ultra, /layman wenyan. In brief modes, cut filler and keep technical terms exact. User says stop layman or normal mode to deactivate.'
